title: The Rise of Online Learning: A New Era in Education
passage:
Online Learning: A Transformative Experience

In recent years, online learning has gained significant traction as a viable alternative to traditional classroom settings. The convenience of accessing courses from anywhere, combined with the flexibility of studying at one's own pace, has made distance education an attractive option for many learners. Various platforms now offer a multitude of courses ranging from professional development to personal enrichment.

One of the key benefits of online education is the ability to tailor learning experiences to individual needs. Students can choose from a wide range of subjects, allowing them to pursue their interests or enhance their skills in specific areas. Additionally, online learning often includes interactive elements such as forums and video conferencing, which foster engagement and collaboration among students.

However, online learning is not without its challenges. Some students may struggle with self-discipline and motivation, as the absence of a structured classroom environment can lead to procrastination. Furthermore, technical issues can hinder the learning experience, making it essential for students to have reliable internet access and familiarity with digital tools.

Despite these challenges, the future of online learning appears bright. Educational institutions continue to innovate, integrating new technologies to enhance the learning experience. As more people recognize the value of distance education, it is likely to become a staple in the educational landscape.

questions.instruction: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
questions.text: What is one major advantage of online learning mentioned in the passage?

options.A: It allows for flexible study times.
options.C: It is always free of charge.

questions.explanation: The passage highlights that online learning offers flexibility in studying, which is a significant advantage.

questions.text: Students often find online learning completely easy.
questions.explanation: The passage mentions that some students struggle with self-discipline and motivation, indicating that it is not always easy.

questions.text: The author believes online learning will always replace traditional education.
questions.explanation: The author discusses the future of online learning but does not state that it will replace traditional education.

questions.instruction: Match the following aspects of online learning with their descriptions.

descriptions.2: Allows students to study at their own pace.

questions.instruction: Answer using no more than two words.
questions.text: What is a common problem faced by online learners?
questions.explanation: The passage specifically mentions that some students struggle with self-discipline.

vocabulary.meaning: the act of gaining popularity or acceptance
to customize according to individual needs
the action of delaying or postponing something

tactics:
Hướng dẫn

When reading the passage, focus on the main ideas and supporting details. Pay attention to the structure of the text, as it often indicates the key points. For multiple-choice questions, eliminate the obviously incorrect answers first. For true/false questions, look for specific wording that matches the passage. Make sure to scan for keywords when answering matching questions.
